title: pilosella cymosa subsp. chrysophaes
intro: Pilosella cymosa subsp. chrysophaes, also known as a subspecies of the plant Pilosella cymosa, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in its use as a diuretic, and has been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Pilosella cymosa subsp. chrysophaes can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
